groups.name: spring-auth
groups.description: spring-auth starter: Laravel-style authentication DX on top of Spring Security. Form login, session, CSRF, password reset, email verification, sudo window, login throttling. Ships defaults, you adapt.

properties.name: spring-auth.enabled
properties.description: Master switch. When false, the starter registers no SecurityFilterChain, flow, or REST endpoint, leaving the application on raw Spring Security defaults.
